changelog:
v1.6.0 Beta
- Word-based transcript editing suite (export to Word, companion audio player, speaker assignment panel)
- Transcript paragraph editor: split, merge, word corrections with audio seek links
- Two-phase speaker identification workflow
- Subscriptions: monitor YouTube channels and Substack publications for new content (beta)
- Google Drive integration (OAuth 2.0, browse and open files)
- Substack article fetching via JSON API (reliable for all URL formats)
- Improved chunked AI processing matching main UI behaviour
- SQLite database backend for documents, prompts and cost tracking
- Podcast browser with Apple Podcasts and RSS feed support
- Audio-linked summaries with clickable seek links in Thread Viewer
- Branch management improvements including branch deletion
- Numerous bug fixes and stability improvements
